mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly job gains above 100k signal robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k monthly gains.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.5%+ monthly increase in industrial production signals strengthening manufacturing activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 0.5% monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both rise > 10% MoM
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS and HOUST both exceed 10% monthly growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 2%+ quarterly decline in GDP growth signals economic weakness that prompts central bank intervention, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where GDPC1 declines more than 2% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: A 0.3pp+ monthly decline in unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that increase corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where UNRATE declines more than 0.3pp MoM.

mechanism_narrative: High consumer confidence (proxied by RSAFS) combined with low inflation (CPIAUCSL < 2%) indicates favorable demand conditions, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS exceeds 450k and CPIAUCSL remains below 2%.

mechanism_narrative: A 1%+ monthly increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening that raises equity discount rates, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS rises more than 1% MoM.
